title: Supreme Court quashes criminal proceedings against Ashoka University professor after Haryana refuses prosecution sanction
summary: The Haryana Police had arrested professor Mahmudabad on May 18. It was alleged that his social media posts on Operation Sindoor had endangered the sovereignty and integrity of the country

title: Two arrested for murder of AR constable in Chilkanagar
summary: The deceased was identified as Paruvula Sudheer Kumar, 32, an AR constable and resident of RTC Colony in Chengicherla

title: Arunachal government transfers 27 senior police officers in major reshuffle
summary: According to a notification, the reshuffle has been done to streamline police administration and bolster the law and order machinery in the northeastern State

title: Supreme Court asks NGO to voice concerns about mercury seepage from Bhopal gas tragedy waste’s residual ash before Madhya Pradesh High Court
summary: NGO Bhopal Gas Peedith Sangharsh Sahyog Samiti urged the Supreme Court to check the filter bags and buried residual ash from the incineration of the waste to check the mercury content

title: 'Illegal' call centre case: Enforcement Directorate conducts raids in West Bengal
summary: It was not immediately clear if the probe is linked to some political funding or inducements linked to the electoral process

title: Kerala Assembly polls: Poster war erupts in UDF in Kasaragod ahead of candidate announcement
summary: Posters, reportedly put up in the name of IUML workers, urge the party not to field him and accuse him of being an “imported” candidate

title: Kerala Assembly polls: Congress throws weight behind former CPI(M) leader G. Sudhakaran in Ambalappuzha
summary: Congress screening committee has decided not to field a party candidate in Ambalappuzha and to extend support to dissident CPI(M) leader G. Sudhakaran instead, according to sources

title: Plugging in: Why India must electrify its kitchens at scale
summary: An IEEFA study from October 2025 found that electric cooking is 37% cheaper than non-subsidised LPG and 14% cheaper than piped natural gas for a family of four in Delhi — without any electricity subsidy
